current_wind.description: Light to moderate breeze from the North-Northeast, with gusts.

wind_info.description: Tailwind with a slight crosswind from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Tailwind helps distance, but wind from 16° might cause a slight right turn at the end. Use a touch of hyzer for control.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind is from the left and behind. RHFH can fight this and keep it straight or anhyzer out.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind is behind and slightly to the left. Natural fade to the right might work well with the wind for maximum distance.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind is behind and slightly to the left. LHFH will fight this. Use an overstable disc to prevent it from turning over too much.

wind_info.description: Tailwind with a slight crosswind from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Tailwind helps distance, but wind from 16° might cause a slight right turn at the end. Use a touch of hyzer for control.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind is from the left and behind. RHFH can fight this and keep it straight or anhyzer out.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind is behind and slightly to the left. Natural fade to the right might work well with the wind for maximum distance.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind is behind and slightly to the left. LHFH will fight this. Use an overstable disc to prevent it from turning over too much.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the left.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH: Wind is from the left (crosswind). RHBH will naturally fade right, which might be pushed further by the wind. Needs a hyzer or a stable disc to fight the left-to-right push. Anhyzer is risky.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH: Wind from the left. RHFH is generally better for left-to-right crosswinds.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH: Wind is from the left and behind. Natural fade to the right coupled with wind from the left might be manageable. Use an understable disc to go straight.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH: Wind from the left. LHFH will fight this. Use an overstable disc to ensure it doesn't turn over.
